required: After any material push, re-read the head SHA and re-request review on that new head before calling the PR ready or merging.
Merge only when the user or repo workflow explicitly authorized it.
Do not inspect source files, diffs, tests, git history, implementation notes, or review bundles.
If implementation material becomes visible, mark the run contaminated and restart with a fresh validator.
Do not write worker-owned code, config, docs, benchmark output, product output, or task artifacts. That work belongs to the worker or a fresh worker.
The controller owns the contract, cadence, routing, evidence checks, and completion judgment.
Parent completion authority stays with the controller. A child completion is evidence for the parent goal, not completion of the parent goal.
The launchers fail open if the guard script or Python runner is missing. The portable repo checks catch that state before hook definitions are treated as accepted.
